capabilities.rationale: Existing segmentation outputs and masks are present; no retraining in release.
reconstructed_structures.pkl contains vertebra and disc meshes.
Geometry-derived and estimated measurements exist; physical calibration and clinical validation missing.
Patient state vectors and clinical state vector exist.
Deterministic graph propagation exists; not physics.
Scenario comparison exists; internal scoring only.
Rule-based future states exist; no follow-up validation.
Anatomy-first centroid/object surgery exists; some metrics remain copied/estimated.
Vertex-level transformations exist; no FEM or tissue mechanics.
Patient Alpha spacing/orientation/slice thickness could not be proven.
Material properties, boundary conditions, solver, and validated meshes missing.
No independent radiologist, biomechanical, prospective, or regulatory validation.
